 S74 — Campaign Autopilot

 Context

 S73 left us with 13 DRE sequences live ( 2030–2042 ), throttle profile phase-a applied (LQD-Universal 10/day, 12 others 0), and a read-only budget reporter at scripts/campaign_budget_status.py . No automation

 adds prospects. The 26,137-lead DRE pool only exists as one-shot scripts in /tmp/ .

 S74 ships one worker: a daily 07:00 CST job that pulls from the DRE pool and adds prospects to the correct cohort sequence, on a strategy-agnostic foundation. That's it. No auto-rebalancer, no YAML, no

 profile-switch UX — those are speculative until LQD drains in ~8 weeks.

 Non-negotiables (Steven's S73 feedback):

 - Daily 07:00 CST weekdays. One tick.

 - Strategy-agnostic ( campaign_* , lead_filters , grade_level_detector ). New strategy = config-only.

 - Respect Tier 1 DRE slice: 266 sends / rolling-7-days.

 - Rule 17: state + IANA tz required → missing = skip.

 - Rule 18: promote /tmp/sf_leads_dre_pass*.py into tools/ FIRST.

 - Rule 19: no raw IDs in Telegram output.

 - Rule 15: never enable sequences; only PATCH throttle on enabled ones.

 - Telegram summary on every tick.

 Foundation decisions

 1. Scope: prospect-adder only. No rebalancer in S74.

 Phase-a is static for ~8 weeks. An auto-rebalancer has no trigger during that window. Build it when a trigger fires, not before. Profile switches remain manual via the existing

 scripts/create_dre_sequences.py --configure-throttles .

 2. Config = plain Python module, not YAML.

 3 real strategies today. YAML adds a loader + schema for zero clarity payoff. Extract to tools/campaign_config.py ; reporter + autopilot import it.

 3. Direct function call, not subprocess.

 Autopilot exposes run_autopilot() ; agent/main.py imports and calls it. Matches _run_daily_signal_scan shape (main.py:4042). No stdout parsing.

 4. Safety fuse = sum(active throttles).

 Not a magic 100. Fuse can't cap below config. If phase-a says LQD=10 others=0, fuse=10.

 5. Pool refresh: scheduled Monday + self-heal at age >8 days.

 Monday rebuild is routine. If Monday's rebuild fails and Tue/Wed/Thu also fail, Friday's run sees age >8d and rebuilds itself. Never silently runs on stale data.

 6. Per-prospect freshness + cohort-exclusivity checks at add-time (correctness, not just polish).

 Before POST: (a) find_prospect_by_email → if last Activity At < 90d , skip recent_activity ; (b) check the prospect's current sequence States → if already in any sequence tagged dre-2026-spring , skip

 already_in_dre_cohort . Without (b), a lead could be in LQD and TC-MS simultaneously — the cadences would collide and tank reply rate. This is the single highest-leverage correctness check in the whole

 system.

 7. Tag disqualified rows, don't drop silently.

 Pool metadata carries counts per reason ( no_state , no_tz , recent_activity , already_in_dre_cohort , etc.). Telegram summary surfaces them. Silent drops are debugging hell.

 8. adds_last_24h uses simple 24h-back filter.

 Outreach's throttle Max Adds Per Day day boundary isn't documented. 24h-back is strictly conservative, tz-math-free, and self-correcting within a cycle.

 9. Preview-before-live gate.

 --preview CLI mode writes a CSV of the exact next batch (email, company, verified_school, bucket, target sequence name). Steven eyeballs 10 rows BEFORE typing /autopilot_live . Catches systematic classifier

 regressions at the only moment that matters.

 10. Live flag persisted, reset path explicit.

 data/campaign_autopilot_state.json stores {"live_mode": bool} . /autopilot_live sets true; /autopilot_dry sets false; kill-switch file disables regardless. Bot restart preserves live mode (deploys are

 routine; reverting on every deploy is annoying not safe). Safety lives in the kill-switch + /autopilot_dry .

 11. Per-day state file, auto-archive ≥30 days old.

 data/dre_autopilot_2026-04-18.state.json — fresh file per day. Yesterday's stuck plans stay as a read-only record; they don't get retried and they don't bleed into today's run. Cleanup is one line at start

 of each run.

 12. Telegram formatter takes names, not IDs.

 Structural Rule 19 enforcement: no formatter parameter is typed as an int that could be a sequence ID. If a maintainer adds one, type-check catches it before ship.

 13. Sleep cadence 60–120s between POSTs.

 10 adds × 120s = 20 min wall time. Finishes before the 08:00 leadership_scan tick.

 14. Telegram summary only lists strategies that did something.

 Pristine unconfigured strategies ( pool_source=None ) are silent. Noise is the enemy of an always-on notification.

 Architecture

 agent/main.py poll loop

 └─> scheduler.check() → "campaign_autopilot" at 07:00 CST weekday

 └─> _run_campaign_autopilot()

 └─> tools.campaign_autopilot.run_autopilot(dry_run=<persisted flag>)

 ├─> tools.campaign_config.STRATEGIES

 ├─> scripts.campaign_budget_status.build_strategy_report() (reuse)

 ├─> tools.campaign_pool.get_or_build_pool(strategy, refresh=<Mon|age>8d>)

 │ ├─> tools.lead_filters.classify_sf_leads_to_dre_buckets()

 │ │ └─> tools.grade_level_detector.* (pure)

 │ └─> tools.timezone_lookup.state_to_timezone

 ├─> per sequence with throttle>0:

 │ need = throttle - adds_last_24h

 │ candidates = pool[bucket][:need_×2_headroom]

 │ for each: find_prospect_by_email → freshness + cohort checks

 │ build LoadPlan list

 ├─> tools.prospect_loader.execute_load_plan(plans, dry_run, sleep=(60,120))

 └─> format_telegram_summary(report) → send_message()

 Files

 New (prerequisite — Rule 18 debt)

 tools/grade_level_detector.py — pure functions lifted from /tmp/sf_leads_dre_pass3.py + pass4.py :

 - detect_grade(company, verified) -> Literal["Elem","MS","HS","All-Grades","Unknown"]

 - map_grade_span(span) -> Optional[Literal["Elem","MS","HS","AllGrades"]]

 - is_virtual(company, verified) -> bool

 - is_homeschool(company) -> bool

 - homeschool_subsplit(company) -> str

 - is_code_ninjas(company) -> bool

 - normalize_name(name) -> str

 Zero I/O, pure functions, string inputs only.

 tools/lead_filters.py — fuzzy-match + classifier (lifted from /tmp/sf_leads_dre_pass5.py ):

 - TC_SOURCES: frozenset[str] (22 strings from memory/project_uni_lead_source_whitelist.md )

 - Territory Index Named Tuple (the 7 dicts from pass5)

 - build_territory_index_stateaware(svc) -> TerritoryIndex

 - fuzzy_match(company, state, idx) -> tuple[Optional[bucket], tag]

 - classify_row(row, idx) -> Optional[bucket_name] (None = excluded)

 - classify_sf_leads_to_dre_buckets(svc=None) -> Dre Pool Result

 - Dre Pool Result.buckets: dict[bucket, list[Lead Row]]

 - Dre Pool Result.excluded: dict[reason, int]

 Sheets I/O gated behind factory; tests mock it.

 New (autopilot proper)

 tools/campaign_config.py — plain Python STRATEGIES: dict[str, Strategy Config] . Typed Dict with: number , display , tier , weekly_budget , sequence_ids OR sequence_ids_loader , pool_source ( "sf_leads_dre" | None ),

 bucket_to_sequence_name (dict | None), throttle_profile_name .

 tools/campaign_pool.py —

 - PoolLead(dataclass) — strict superset of prospect_loader.Contact : same fields plus bucket: str , source_row_id: str for audit. email_confidence defaults to "VERIFIED" for SF-Leads source.

 - Strategy Pool — {buckets: dict[bucket, list[Pool Lead]], excluded: dict[reason, int], built_at, total_eligible} .

 - get_or_build_pool(strategy_key, *, force_refresh=False) -> StrategyPool :

 - If data/<key>_pool.jsonl exists AND age ≤ 8d AND not force → load.

 - Else build_pool() .

 - build_pool(strategy_key) -> StrategyPool :

 - Dispatches on pool_source . For "sf_leads_dre" : lead_filters.classify_sf_leads_to_dre_buckets() → per-row state → timezone_lookup.state_to_timezone → tag no_state / no_tz → JSONL.

 - NOTE: 90-day dormancy was applied at S72 upstream. At-add-time freshness check in autopilot handles drift since.

 - JSONL schema version in .meta.json sidecar ( schema_version: 1 ).

 tools/campaign_autopilot.py —

 - run_autopilot(strategy_key="all", *, dry_run, preview_only=False) -> AutopilotReport

 - Kill-switch check FIRST: Path("~/.claude/state/scout-campaign-autopilot-disabled").expanduser().exists() → returns disabled report.

 - Per-strategy flow:

 a. Pool load/refresh (Monday OR age>8d OR force).

 b. build_strategy_report(strategy) → per-sequence throttle , enabled .

 c. For each enabled sequence with throttle > 0 :

 - need = throttle - adds_last_24h(seq_id)

 - Pull need × 2 candidates from pool[bucket] (headroom for skips).

 - For each candidate:

 - find_prospect_by_email(email) → if exists, check last Activity At . <90d → skip recent_activity .

 - If prospect exists, check sequenceStates tags → if any tag in {"dre-2026-spring"} → skip already_in_dre_cohort .

 - Else build LoadPlan .

 - Stop at need plans.

 d. If preview_only : write CSV, return.

 e. Else execute_load_plan(plans, state_path=data/dre_autopilot_<today>.state.json, sleep_seconds=(60,120), dry_run=dry_run) .

 - format_telegram_summary(report, *, live: bool) -> str — accepts dicts keyed by sequence NAME (not id).

 - Archive state files >30d → data/archive/ .

 - CLI __main__ : --strategy , --dry-run / --live , --preview , --refresh-pool .

 agent/scheduler.py — __init__ : self._last_campaign_autopilot_date = None . In check() weekday block:

 if hour == 7 and minute == 0 :

 if self._last_campaign_autopilot_date != today:

 self._last_campaign_autopilot_date = today

 return "campaign_autopilot"

 agent/main.py —

 - _run_campaign_autopilot() handler modeled on _run_daily_signal_scan (try/except + Telegram error on failure + send summary on success).

 - Dispatch in the scheduler loop (grep for how "signal_scan" is matched).

 - Startup: load data/campaign_autopilot_state.json → _autopilot_live_flag: bool .

 - Slash commands /autopilot_live + /autopilot_dry (Rule 14 direct-dispatch pattern) — update flag + rewrite state file + reply confirmation.

 - In-memory _autopilot_running: bool ; /autopilot_live refuses with warning if already running.

 agent/CLAUDE.md — add "campaign_autopilot" to Scheduler event enum; document new /autopilot_live + /autopilot_dry commands.

 scripts/campaign_budget_status.py — from tools.campaign_config import STRATEGIES . CLI behavior unchanged. Delete the inline dict.

 .gitignore — data/*_pool.jsonl , data/*_pool.meta.json , data/dre_autopilot_*.state.json , data/campaign_autopilot_state.json , data/archive/ , vault/logs/campaign_autopilot.jsonl .

 Build sequence (6 commits)

 Highest-leverage correctness gates sit at commits 2 (classifier parity) and 5 (cohort-exclusivity + preview). Anything after an unreversed upstream mistake gets redone — hence this ordering.

 Commit 1 — tools/grade_level_detector.py + tests.

 Lift pure functions from /tmp/sf_leads_dre_pass3.py + pass4.py . scripts/test_grade_level_detector.py covers 30+ fixture rows (Elem/MS/HS/All/Virtual/Homeschool/CodeNinjas/Unknown edge cases).

 Verify: .venv/bin/python -m pytest scripts/test_grade_level_detector.py -v .

 Commit 2 — tools/lead_filters.py + tests + live parity check.

 Lift fuzzy-match + classifier from /tmp/sf_leads_dre_pass5.py . Unit tests with mocked Sheets service.

 Verify (live, must pass before merge): run classifier against production SF Leads + Territory Schools. Per-bucket counts must match pass5's measured baselines (pass5.py:44 PASS4 dict) within ±50 rows. Total

 must match 26,137 measured within ±300. Record exact deltas in commit message.

 Commit 3 — tools/campaign_config.py + reporter refactor.

 Extract STRATEGIES to new module; add autopilot keys ( pool_source , bucket_to_sequence_name , throttle_profile_name ) to DRE entry. Reporter imports from it.

 Verify: diff <(git stash; python scripts/campaign_budget_status.py --format json; git stash pop) <(python scripts/campaign_budget_status.py --format json) byte-identical.

 Commit 4 — tools/campaign_pool.py + scripts/build_campaign_pool.py .

 Pool builder writes JSONL + .meta.json . Rule-17 tagging (not dropping).

 Verify:

 - python scripts/build_campaign_pool.py --strategy dre writes data/dre_2026_spring_pool.jsonl .

 - wc -l data/dre_2026_spring_pool.jsonl within ±300 of 26,137 (after no_state + no_tz drops).

 - jq -c '. | {state, tz}' data/dre_2026_spring_pool.jsonl | grep -v '"state":"[A-Z][A-Z]"' | head → empty (every row has 2-char state).

 - .meta.json shows excluded-reason breakdown summing correctly.

 Commit 5 — tools/campaign_autopilot.py (core + preview + all correctness checks).

 Implements kill-switch check, need computation, per-candidate freshness + cohort-exclusivity checks, LoadPlan build, preview CSV, dry-run summary.

 Verify (multi-step):

 1. python -m tools.campaign_autopilot --dry-run --strategy dre → stdout shows Telegram-formatted summary. Grep grep -oE '\b20[1-4][0-9]\b' → empty (no raw IDs).

 2. python -m tools.campaign_autopilot --preview --strategy dre → writes /tmp/campaign_preview_<ts>.csv . Cat it. Manually verify:

 - 10 rows for LQD-Universal.

 - Each row has plausible bucket→sequence mapping.

 - No row has a .com email domain in company field (common classifier bug).

 - No row's email matches an address Steven recognizes as already-active.

 3. python -c "from tools.campaign_autopilot import run_autopilot; r = run_autopilot(dry_run=True); print(r.total_attempted, r.skipped_already_in_cohort, r.skipped_recent_activity)" → confirms the

 correctness checks actually fire on real data (non-zero skipped_* counts are expected and healthy).

 Commit 6 — scheduler wire + slash commands + persistent flag.

 agent/scheduler.py tick. agent/main.py handler + /autopilot_live + /autopilot_dry . Startup loads persisted flag. Error path: any run_autopilot exception → Telegram message with traceback summary.

 Verify (end-to-end ship):

 1. Restart Scout. data/campaign_autopilot_state.json does not exist → flag defaults to False → dry-run mode.

 2. Trigger handler directly: python -c "import asyncio; from agent.main import _run_campaign_autopilot; asyncio.run(_run_campaign_autopilot())" → Telegram gets [DRY RUN] summary.

 3. Inspect vault/logs/campaign_autopilot.jsonl last line: mode=dry_run , strategies.dre.sequences.LQD-Universal.attempted=10, succeeded=0 .

 4. Run --preview CLI locally. Eyeball 10 rows. Spot-check 2 emails in Outreach UI — confirm they're real leads not already active.

 5. Send /autopilot_live in Telegram → confirmation reply → state file updated → cat data/campaign_autopilot_state.json shows {"live_mode": true} .

 6. Re-trigger handler → Telegram gets [LIVE] summary → audit log shows succeeded=10 .

 7. Outreach UI: LQD-Universal has 10 new active prospects. Each prospect record has populated State + Timezone.

 8. Send /autopilot_dry → back to dry-run.

 9. Wait for next 07:00 CST weekday tick → autopilot fires on its own in dry-run mode. Steven sends /autopilot_live when ready for autonomous live runs.

 Telegram format

 🤖 Campaign Autopilot — 2026-04-18 07:00 CST

 [DRY RUN — /autopilot_live to enable real adds]

 DRE (Dormant Re-Engage) · Tier 1

 Sends 7d: 47/266 (17.7%), 219 headroom

 Profile: phase-a (held)

 Would add 10 → LQD-Universal (cohort: 397 left)

 Pool: 26,137 eligible (built Mon 07:02 CST)

 Tier 1 TOTAL: 47/1,063, 1,016 headroom

 Live mode: [LIVE] , Would add → Added . No other strategies printed (pristine unconfigured strategies silent).

 Audit log

 vault/logs/campaign_autopilot.jsonl — one line per run:

 { "ts_utc" : "..." , "ts_cst" : "..." , "mode" : "dry_run|live|disabled|error" ,

 "strategies" : { "dre" : { "budget_7d" : 266 , "sends_7d" : 47 , "headroom" : 219 ,

 "sequences" : { "LQD-Universal" : { "throttle" : 10 , "adds_last_24h" : 0 ,

 "need" : 10 , "attempted" : 10 , "succeeded" : 10 ,

 "skipped_rule17" : 0 , "skipped_recent_activity" : 3 ,

 "skipped_already_in_dre_cohort" : 1 , "skipped_dedup" : 0 , "failed" : 0 }},

 "pool_built_at" : "..." , "pool_excluded" : { "no_state" : 312 , "no_tz" : 4 }}},

 "errors" : []}

 Risks

 ┌───────────────────────────────────────────────────────┬────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐

 │ Risk │ Mitigation │

 ├───────────────────────────────────────────────────────┼────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤

 │ Classifier regression routes leads to wrong cohort │ Commit 2 live parity (±50/bucket, ±300 total). Commit 5 --preview CSV eyeballed before first live run │

 ├───────────────────────────────────────────────────────┼────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤

 │ Lead already in another DRE sequence → cadence │ already_in_dre_cohort check via sequenceStates tag filter before each add │

 │ collision │ │

 ├───────────────────────────────────────────────────────┼────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤

 │ Lead had manual touch since S72 pool built → stepping │ find_prospect_by_email + last Activity At < 90d check before each add │

 │ on Steven │ │

 ├───────────────────────────────────────────────────────┼────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤

 │ Monday pool rebuild fails → Tue-Fri on stale data │ Self-heal: age >8d triggers rebuild on any run; surfaced in summary │

 ├───────────────────────────────────────────────────────┼────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤

 │ Bot crash mid-run orphans today's state file │ Per-day state file ( dre_autopilot_<today>.state.json ). Yesterday's stuck plans don't bleed into today; they're a read-only forensic record. Lost │

 │ │ adds: ≤10/day, recoverable manually │

 ├───────────────────────────────────────────────────────┼────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤

 │ throttle Max Adds Per Day day boundary ≠ our 24h-back │ Conservative: under-sends slightly on days after manual bursts. Revisit if audit log shows attempted > succeeded due to Outreach 429s │

 │ filter │ │

 ├───────────────────────────────────────────────────────┼────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤

 │ Rule 19 slip in Telegram output │ Formatter typed to take names, never IDs. Commit 5 grep check │

 ├───────────────────────────────────────────────────────┼────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤

 │ Railway deploy reverts live flag │ Persisted in data/campaign_autopilot_state.json ; survives restarts │

 │ Concurrent command ( /drip_* ) during autopilot run → │ _autopilot_running flag logs warning; outreach_client already handles 429 retries │

 │ Outreach 429 │ │

 ├───────────────────────────────────────────────────────┼────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤

 │ Sheets API down at 07:00 │ Try/except in handler → Telegram error message with traceback summary. Tue retries; if Tue also fails and today's Monday rebuild needed, run │

 │ │ aborts with explicit warning │

 └───────────────────────────────────────────────────────┴────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘

 - prospect_loader.Contact.diocese_or_group field name is domain-specific. Autopilot passes the cohort bucket name ("TC-MS" etc.) through it — ugly but non-breaking. Rename to cohort_tag post-S74 with single

 caller update in diocesan_drip.py .

 - Morning brief doesn't yet include yesterday's autopilot outcome. Add after 2 weeks of live data exists to report against.

 - /apply_profile slash command for Steven to switch phase-a → proportional in one command. Defer until LQD actually drains.

 Non-goals (deferred)

 - tools/campaign_rebalancer.py . Defer until a real transition trigger exists.

 - YAML config. Defer until ~15 strategies.

 - Reply-rate-driven throttle tuning. Needs 2–3 weeks of live data.

 - Wiring pools for strategies #9 / #11. Config entries pool_source=None ; autopilot silently skips.

 - Generalizing classifier beyond DRE. Each strategy gets its own pool_source value + dispatch case in campaign_pool.build_pool when its turn comes.

 S74 — Campaign Autopilot

 Context

 S73 left us with 13 DRE sequences live ( 2030–2042 ), throttle profile phase-a applied (LQD-Universal 10/day, 12 others 0), and a read-only budget reporter at scripts/campaign_budget_status.py . No automation

 adds prospects. The 26,137-lead DRE pool only exists as one-shot scripts in /tmp/ .

 S74 ships one worker: a daily 07:00 CST job that pulls from the DRE pool and adds prospects to the correct cohort sequence, on a strategy-agnostic foundation. That's it. No auto-rebalancer, no YAML, no

 profile-switch UX — those are speculative until LQD drains in ~8 weeks.

 Non-negotiables (Steven's S73 feedback):

 - Daily 07:00 CST weekdays. One tick.

 - Strategy-agnostic ( campaign_* , lead_filters , grade_level_detector ). New strategy = config-only.

 - Respect Tier 1 DRE slice: 266 sends / rolling-7-days.

 - Rule 17: state + IANA tz required → missing = skip.

 - Rule 18: promote /tmp/sf_leads_dre_pass*.py into tools/ FIRST.

 - Rule 19: no raw IDs in Telegram output.

 - Rule 15: never enable sequences; only PATCH throttle on enabled ones.

 - Telegram summary on every tick.

 Foundation decisions

 1. Scope: prospect-adder only. No rebalancer in S74.

 Phase-a is static for ~8 weeks. An auto-rebalancer has no trigger during that window. Build it when a trigger fires, not before. Profile switches remain manual via the existing

 scripts/create_dre_sequences.py --configure-throttles .

 2. Config = plain Python module, not YAML.

 3 real strategies today. YAML adds a loader + schema for zero clarity payoff. Extract to tools/campaign_config.py ; reporter + autopilot import it.

 3. Direct function call, not subprocess.

 Autopilot exposes run_autopilot() ; agent/main.py imports and calls it. Matches _run_daily_signal_scan shape (main.py:4042). No stdout parsing.

 4. Safety fuse = sum(active throttles).

 Not a magic 100. Fuse can't cap below config. If phase-a says LQD=10 others=0, fuse=10.

 5. Pool refresh: scheduled Monday + self-heal at age >8 days.

 Monday rebuild is routine. If Monday's rebuild fails and Tue/Wed/Thu also fail, Friday's run sees age >8d and rebuilds itself. Never silently runs on stale data.

 6. Per-prospect freshness + cohort-exclusivity checks at add-time (correctness, not just polish).

 Before POST: (a) find_prospect_by_email → if last Activity At < 90d , skip recent_activity ; (b) check the prospect's current sequence States → if already in any sequence tagged dre-2026-spring , skip

 already_in_dre_cohort . Without (b), a lead could be in LQD and TC-MS simultaneously — the cadences would collide and tank reply rate. This is the single highest-leverage correctness check in the whole

 system.

 7. Tag disqualified rows, don't drop silently.

 Pool metadata carries counts per reason ( no_state , no_tz , recent_activity , already_in_dre_cohort , etc.). Telegram summary surfaces them. Silent drops are debugging hell.

 8. adds_last_24h uses simple 24h-back filter.

 Outreach's throttle Max Adds Per Day day boundary isn't documented. 24h-back is strictly conservative, tz-math-free, and self-correcting within a cycle.

 9. Preview-before-live gate.

 --preview CLI mode writes a CSV of the exact next batch (email, company, verified_school, bucket, target sequence name). Steven eyeballs 10 rows BEFORE typing /autopilot_live . Catches systematic classifier

 regressions at the only moment that matters.

 10. Live flag persisted, reset path explicit.

 data/campaign_autopilot_state.json stores {"live_mode": bool} . /autopilot_live sets true; /autopilot_dry sets false; kill-switch file disables regardless. Bot restart preserves live mode (deploys are

 routine; reverting on every deploy is annoying not safe). Safety lives in the kill-switch + /autopilot_dry .

 11. Per-day state file, auto-archive ≥30 days old.

 data/dre_autopilot_2026-04-18.state.json — fresh file per day. Yesterday's stuck plans stay as a read-only record; they don't get retried and they don't bleed into today's run. Cleanup is one line at start

 of each run.

 12. Telegram formatter takes names, not IDs.

 Structural Rule 19 enforcement: no formatter parameter is typed as an int that could be a sequence ID. If a maintainer adds one, type-check catches it before ship.

 13. Sleep cadence 60–120s between POSTs.

 10 adds × 120s = 20 min wall time. Finishes before the 08:00 leadership_scan tick.

 14. Telegram summary only lists strategies that did something.

 Pristine unconfigured strategies ( pool_source=None ) are silent. Noise is the enemy of an always-on notification.

 Architecture

 agent/main.py poll loop

 └─> scheduler.check() → "campaign_autopilot" at 07:00 CST weekday

 └─> _run_campaign_autopilot()

 └─> tools.campaign_autopilot.run_autopilot(dry_run=<persisted flag>)

 ├─> tools.campaign_config.STRATEGIES

 ├─> scripts.campaign_budget_status.build_strategy_report() (reuse)

 ├─> tools.campaign_pool.get_or_build_pool(strategy, refresh=<Mon|age>8d>)

 │ ├─> tools.lead_filters.classify_sf_leads_to_dre_buckets()

 │ │ └─> tools.grade_level_detector.* (pure)

 │ └─> tools.timezone_lookup.state_to_timezone

 ├─> per sequence with throttle>0:

 │ need = throttle - adds_last_24h

 │ candidates = pool[bucket][:need_×2_headroom]

 │ for each: find_prospect_by_email → freshness + cohort checks

 │ build LoadPlan list

 ├─> tools.prospect_loader.execute_load_plan(plans, dry_run, sleep=(60,120))

 └─> format_telegram_summary(report) → send_message()

 Files

 New (prerequisite — Rule 18 debt)

 tools/grade_level_detector.py — pure functions lifted from /tmp/sf_leads_dre_pass3.py + pass4.py :

 - detect_grade(company, verified) -> Literal["Elem","MS","HS","All-Grades","Unknown"]

 - map_grade_span(span) -> Optional[Literal["Elem","MS","HS","AllGrades"]]

 - is_virtual(company, verified) -> bool

 - is_homeschool(company) -> bool

 - homeschool_subsplit(company) -> str

 - is_code_ninjas(company) -> bool

 - normalize_name(name) -> str

 Zero I/O, pure functions, string inputs only.

 tools/lead_filters.py — fuzzy-match + classifier (lifted from /tmp/sf_leads_dre_pass5.py ):

 - TC_SOURCES: frozenset[str] (22 strings from memory/project_uni_lead_source_whitelist.md )

 - Territory Index Named Tuple (the 7 dicts from pass5)

 - build_territory_index_stateaware(svc) -> TerritoryIndex

 - fuzzy_match(company, state, idx) -> tuple[Optional[bucket], tag]

 - classify_row(row, idx) -> Optional[bucket_name] (None = excluded)

 - classify_sf_leads_to_dre_buckets(svc=None) -> Dre Pool Result

 - Dre Pool Result.buckets: dict[bucket, list[Lead Row]]

 - Dre Pool Result.excluded: dict[reason, int]

 Sheets I/O gated behind factory; tests mock it.

 New (autopilot proper)

 tools/campaign_config.py — plain Python STRATEGIES: dict[str, Strategy Config] . Typed Dict with: number , display , tier , weekly_budget , sequence_ids OR sequence_ids_loader , pool_source ( "sf_leads_dre" | None ),

 bucket_to_sequence_name (dict | None), throttle_profile_name .

 tools/campaign_pool.py —

 - PoolLead(dataclass) — strict superset of prospect_loader.Contact : same fields plus bucket: str , source_row_id: str for audit. email_confidence defaults to "VERIFIED" for SF-Leads source.

 - Strategy Pool — {buckets: dict[bucket, list[Pool Lead]], excluded: dict[reason, int], built_at, total_eligible} .

 - get_or_build_pool(strategy_key, *, force_refresh=False) -> StrategyPool :

 - If data/<key>_pool.jsonl exists AND age ≤ 8d AND not force → load.

 - Else build_pool() .

 - build_pool(strategy_key) -> StrategyPool :

 - Dispatches on pool_source . For "sf_leads_dre" : lead_filters.classify_sf_leads_to_dre_buckets() → per-row state → timezone_lookup.state_to_timezone → tag no_state / no_tz → JSONL.

 - NOTE: 90-day dormancy was applied at S72 upstream. At-add-time freshness check in autopilot handles drift since.

 - JSONL schema version in .meta.json sidecar ( schema_version: 1 ).

 tools/campaign_autopilot.py —

 - run_autopilot(strategy_key="all", *, dry_run, preview_only=False) -> AutopilotReport

 - Kill-switch check FIRST: Path("~/.claude/state/scout-campaign-autopilot-disabled").expanduser().exists() → returns disabled report.

 - Per-strategy flow:

 a. Pool load/refresh (Monday OR age>8d OR force).

 b. build_strategy_report(strategy) → per-sequence throttle , enabled .

 c. For each enabled sequence with throttle > 0 :

 - need = throttle - adds_last_24h(seq_id)

 - Pull need × 2 candidates from pool[bucket] (headroom for skips).

 - For each candidate:

 - find_prospect_by_email(email) → if exists, check last Activity At . <90d → skip recent_activity .

 - If prospect exists, check sequenceStates tags → if any tag in {"dre-2026-spring"} → skip already_in_dre_cohort .

 - Else build LoadPlan .

 - Stop at need plans.

 d. If preview_only : write CSV, return.

 e. Else execute_load_plan(plans, state_path=data/dre_autopilot_<today>.state.json, sleep_seconds=(60,120), dry_run=dry_run) .

 - format_telegram_summary(report, *, live: bool) -> str — accepts dicts keyed by sequence NAME (not id).

 - Archive state files >30d → data/archive/ .

 - CLI __main__ : --strategy , --dry-run / --live , --preview , --refresh-pool .

 agent/scheduler.py — __init__ : self._last_campaign_autopilot_date = None . In check() weekday block:

 if hour == 7 and minute == 0 :

 if self._last_campaign_autopilot_date != today:

 self._last_campaign_autopilot_date = today

 return "campaign_autopilot"

 agent/main.py —

 - _run_campaign_autopilot() handler modeled on _run_daily_signal_scan (try/except + Telegram error on failure + send summary on success).

 - Dispatch in the scheduler loop (grep for how "signal_scan" is matched).

 - Startup: load data/campaign_autopilot_state.json → _autopilot_live_flag: bool .

 - Slash commands /autopilot_live + /autopilot_dry (Rule 14 direct-dispatch pattern) — update flag + rewrite state file + reply confirmation.

 - In-memory _autopilot_running: bool ; /autopilot_live refuses with warning if already running.

 agent/CLAUDE.md — add "campaign_autopilot" to Scheduler event enum; document new /autopilot_live + /autopilot_dry commands.

 scripts/campaign_budget_status.py — from tools.campaign_config import STRATEGIES . CLI behavior unchanged. Delete the inline dict.

 .gitignore — data/*_pool.jsonl , data/*_pool.meta.json , data/dre_autopilot_*.state.json , data/campaign_autopilot_state.json , data/archive/ , vault/logs/campaign_autopilot.jsonl .

 Build sequence (6 commits)

 Highest-leverage correctness gates sit at commits 2 (classifier parity) and 5 (cohort-exclusivity + preview). Anything after an unreversed upstream mistake gets redone — hence this ordering.

 Commit 1 — tools/grade_level_detector.py + tests.

 Lift pure functions from /tmp/sf_leads_dre_pass3.py + pass4.py . scripts/test_grade_level_detector.py covers 30+ fixture rows (Elem/MS/HS/All/Virtual/Homeschool/CodeNinjas/Unknown edge cases).

 Verify: .venv/bin/python -m pytest scripts/test_grade_level_detector.py -v .

 Commit 2 — tools/lead_filters.py + tests + live parity check.

 Lift fuzzy-match + classifier from /tmp/sf_leads_dre_pass5.py . Unit tests with mocked Sheets service.

 Verify (live, must pass before merge): run classifier against production SF Leads + Territory Schools. Per-bucket counts must match pass5's measured baselines (pass5.py:44 PASS4 dict) within ±50 rows. Total

 must match 26,137 measured within ±300. Record exact deltas in commit message.

 Commit 3 — tools/campaign_config.py + reporter refactor.

 Extract STRATEGIES to new module; add autopilot keys ( pool_source , bucket_to_sequence_name , throttle_profile_name ) to DRE entry. Reporter imports from it.

 Verify: diff <(git stash; python scripts/campaign_budget_status.py --format json; git stash pop) <(python scripts/campaign_budget_status.py --format json) byte-identical.

 Commit 4 — tools/campaign_pool.py + scripts/build_campaign_pool.py .

 Pool builder writes JSONL + .meta.json . Rule-17 tagging (not dropping).

 Verify:

 - python scripts/build_campaign_pool.py --strategy dre writes data/dre_2026_spring_pool.jsonl .

 - wc -l data/dre_2026_spring_pool.jsonl within ±300 of 26,137 (after no_state + no_tz drops).

 - jq -c '. | {state, tz}' data/dre_2026_spring_pool.jsonl | grep -v '"state":"[A-Z][A-Z]"' | head → empty (every row has 2-char state).

 - .meta.json shows excluded-reason breakdown summing correctly.

 Commit 5 — tools/campaign_autopilot.py (core + preview + all correctness checks).

 Implements kill-switch check, need computation, per-candidate freshness + cohort-exclusivity checks, LoadPlan build, preview CSV, dry-run summary.

 Verify (multi-step):

 1. python -m tools.campaign_autopilot --dry-run --strategy dre → stdout shows Telegram-formatted summary. Grep grep -oE '\b20[1-4][0-9]\b' → empty (no raw IDs).

 2. python -m tools.campaign_autopilot --preview --strategy dre → writes /tmp/campaign_preview_<ts>.csv . Cat it. Manually verify:

 - 10 rows for LQD-Universal.

 - Each row has plausible bucket→sequence mapping.

 - No row has a .com email domain in company field (common classifier bug).

 - No row's email matches an address Steven recognizes as already-active.

 3. python -c "from tools.campaign_autopilot import run_autopilot; r = run_autopilot(dry_run=True); print(r.total_attempted, r.skipped_already_in_cohort, r.skipped_recent_activity)" → confirms the

 correctness checks actually fire on real data (non-zero skipped_* counts are expected and healthy).

 Commit 6 — scheduler wire + slash commands + persistent flag.

 agent/scheduler.py tick. agent/main.py handler + /autopilot_live + /autopilot_dry . Startup loads persisted flag. Error path: any run_autopilot exception → Telegram message with traceback summary.

 Verify (end-to-end ship):

 1. Restart Scout. data/campaign_autopilot_state.json does not exist → flag defaults to False → dry-run mode.

 2. Trigger handler directly: python -c "import asyncio; from agent.main import _run_campaign_autopilot; asyncio.run(_run_campaign_autopilot())" → Telegram gets [DRY RUN] summary.

 3. Inspect vault/logs/campaign_autopilot.jsonl last line: mode=dry_run , strategies.dre.sequences.LQD-Universal.attempted=10, succeeded=0 .

 4. Run --preview CLI locally. Eyeball 10 rows. Spot-check 2 emails in Outreach UI — confirm they're real leads not already active.

 5. Send /autopilot_live in Telegram → confirmation reply → state file updated → cat data/campaign_autopilot_state.json shows {"live_mode": true} .

 6. Re-trigger handler → Telegram gets [LIVE] summary → audit log shows succeeded=10 .

 7. Outreach UI: LQD-Universal has 10 new active prospects. Each prospect record has populated State + Timezone.

 8. Send /autopilot_dry → back to dry-run.

 9. Wait for next 07:00 CST weekday tick → autopilot fires on its own in dry-run mode. Steven sends /autopilot_live when ready for autonomous live runs.

 Telegram format

 🤖 Campaign Autopilot — 2026-04-18 07:00 CST

 [DRY RUN — /autopilot_live to enable real adds]

 DRE (Dormant Re-Engage) · Tier 1

 Sends 7d: 47/266 (17.7%), 219 headroom

 Profile: phase-a (held)

 Would add 10 → LQD-Universal (cohort: 397 left)

 Pool: 26,137 eligible (built Mon 07:02 CST)

 Tier 1 TOTAL: 47/1,063, 1,016 headroom

 Live mode: [LIVE] , Would add → Added . No other strategies printed (pristine unconfigured strategies silent).

 Audit log

 vault/logs/campaign_autopilot.jsonl — one line per run:

 { "ts_utc" : "..." , "ts_cst" : "..." , "mode" : "dry_run|live|disabled|error" ,

 "strategies" : { "dre" : { "budget_7d" : 266 , "sends_7d" : 47 , "headroom" : 219 ,

 "sequences" : { "LQD-Universal" : { "throttle" : 10 , "adds_last_24h" : 0 ,

 "need" : 10 , "attempted" : 10 , "succeeded" : 10 ,

 "skipped_rule17" : 0 , "skipped_recent_activity" : 3 ,

 "skipped_already_in_dre_cohort" : 1 , "skipped_dedup" : 0 , "failed" : 0 }},

 "pool_built_at" : "..." , "pool_excluded" : { "no_state" : 312 , "no_tz" : 4 }}},

 "errors" : []}

 Risks

 ┌───────────────────────────────────────────────────────┬────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐

 │ Risk │ Mitigation │

 ├───────────────────────────────────────────────────────┼────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤

 │ Classifier regression routes leads to wrong cohort │ Commit 2 live parity (±50/bucket, ±300 total). Commit 5 --preview CSV eyeballed before first live run │

 ├───────────────────────────────────────────────────────┼────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤

 │ Lead already in another DRE sequence → cadence │ already_in_dre_cohort check via sequenceStates tag filter before each add │

 │ collision │ │

 ├───────────────────────────────────────────────────────┼────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤

 │ Lead had manual touch since S72 pool built → stepping │ find_prospect_by_email + last Activity At < 90d check before each add │

 │ on Steven │ │

 ├───────────────────────────────────────────────────────┼────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤

 │ Monday pool rebuild fails → Tue-Fri on stale data │ Self-heal: age >8d triggers rebuild on any run; surfaced in summary │

 ├───────────────────────────────────────────────────────┼────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤

 │ Bot crash mid-run orphans today's state file │ Per-day state file ( dre_autopilot_<today>.state.json ). Yesterday's stuck plans don't bleed into today; they're a read-only forensic record. Lost │

 │ │ adds: ≤10/day, recoverable manually │

 ├───────────────────────────────────────────────────────┼────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤

 │ throttle Max Adds Per Day day boundary ≠ our 24h-back │ Conservative: under-sends slightly on days after manual bursts. Revisit if audit log shows attempted > succeeded due to Outreach 429s │

 │ filter │ │

 ├───────────────────────────────────────────────────────┼────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤

 │ Rule 19 slip in Telegram output │ Formatter typed to take names, never IDs. Commit 5 grep check │

 ├───────────────────────────────────────────────────────┼────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤

 │ Railway deploy reverts live flag │ Persisted in data/campaign_autopilot_state.json ; survives restarts │

 ├───────────────────────────────────────────────────────┼────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤

 │ Concurrent command ( /drip_* ) during autopilot run → │ _autopilot_running flag logs warning; outreach_client already handles 429 retries │

 │ Outreach 429 │ │

 ├───────────────────────────────────────────────────────┼────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤

 │ Autopilot wall-time > 08:00 leadership_scan window │ Worst case 10 adds × 120s = 20 min. Hard cap: bail after 45 min │

 ├───────────────────────────────────────────────────────┼────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤

 │ Sheets API down at 07:00 │ Try/except in handler → Telegram error message with traceback summary. Tue retries; if Tue also fails and today's Monday rebuild needed, run │

 │ │ aborts with explicit warning │

 └───────────────────────────────────────────────────────┴────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘

 - prospect_loader.Contact.diocese_or_group field name is domain-specific. Autopilot passes the cohort bucket name ("TC-MS" etc.) through it — ugly but non-breaking. Rename to cohort_tag post-S74 with single

 caller update in diocesan_drip.py .

 - Morning brief doesn't yet include yesterday's autopilot outcome. Add after 2 weeks of live data exists to report against.

 - /apply_profile slash command for Steven to switch phase-a → proportional in one command. Defer until LQD actually drains.

 Non-goals (deferred)

 - tools/campaign_rebalancer.py . Defer until a real transition trigger exists.

 - YAML config. Defer until ~15 strategies.

 - Reply-rate-driven throttle tuning. Needs 2–3 weeks of live data.

 - Wiring pools for strategies #9 / #11. Config entries pool_source=None ; autopilot silently skips.

 - Generalizing classifier beyond DRE. Each strategy gets its own pool_source value + dispatch case in campaign_pool.build_pool when its turn comes.

 Change log from prior draft

 ┌─────┬──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┬───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐

 │ # │ Change │ Why │

 ├─────┼──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┼───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤

 │ 1 │ Added already_in_dre_cohort check at add-time │ Correctness bug. Lead could be in LQD + TC-MS simultaneously; cadences would collide. Single highest-leverage correctness │

 │ │ │ gate │

 ├─────┼──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┼───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤

 │ 2 │ Added last Activity At < 90d freshness recheck at add-time │ S72 pool was 90d-filtered at build. Days-to-weeks between build and run leaves drift; Steven's manual touches need respecting │

 ├─────┼──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┼───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤

 │ 3 │ Added --preview CSV mode + explicit eyeball step before │ Systematic classifier regression would mis-route 10 leads in week 1 otherwise. Totals parity (±50) is necessary but not │

 │ │ /autopilot_live │ sufficient │

 ├─────┼──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┼───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤

 │ 4 │ Persist live flag across restarts (was: reset on restart) │ Railway deploys are routine; reverting every deploy is annoyance, not safety. Safety lives in kill-switch + /autopilot_dry │

 ├─────┼──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┼───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤

 │ 5 │ Per-day state file + ≥30d archive │ Mid-run crashes no longer orphan work into today's path; cleanup is one line │

 ├─────┼──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┼───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤

 │ 6 │ Self-heal pool rebuild on age >8d (was: Monday only) │ Monday failure silently polluted Tue-Fri otherwise │

 ├─────┼──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┼───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤

 │ 7 │ Silent-skip strategies with pool_source=None in Telegram summary │ Noise kills daily-summary signal fast with 24 strategies queued up │

 ├─────┼──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┼───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤

 │ 8 │ Pool-builder lifts from pass3+pass4+pass5 (was: "pass5") │ pass5 imports from pass3+4; accurate scope for commit 1+2 │

 ├─────┼──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┼───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤

 │ 9 │ _autopilot_running flag to warn on concurrent Outreach writes │ Low-probability race; catch with a log line, not a lock │

 ├─────┼──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┼───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤

 │ 10 │ Documented diocese_or_group rename as debt, not a blocker │ Field rename across live callers adds risk without S74 value │

 └─────┴──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┴───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘

 S74 — Campaign Autopilot

 Context

 S73 left us with 13 DRE sequences live ( 2030–2042 ), throttle profile phase-a applied (LQD-Universal 10/day, 12 others 0), and a read-only budget reporter at scripts/campaign_budget_status.py . No automation

 adds prospects. The 26,137-lead DRE pool only exists as one-shot scripts in /tmp/ .

 S74 ships one worker: a daily 07:00 CST job that pulls from the DRE pool and adds prospects to the correct cohort sequence, on a strategy-agnostic foundation. That's it. No auto-rebalancer, no YAML, no

 profile-switch UX — those are speculative until LQD drains in ~8 weeks.

 Non-negotiables (Steven's S73 feedback):

 - Daily 07:00 CST weekdays. One tick.

 - Strategy-agnostic ( campaign_* , lead_filters , grade_level_detector ). New strategy = config-only.

 - Respect Tier 1 DRE slice: 266 sends / rolling-7-days.

 - Rule 17: state + IANA tz required → missing = skip.

 - Rule 18: promote /tmp/sf_leads_dre_pass*.py into tools/ FIRST.

 - Rule 19: no raw IDs in Telegram output.

 - Rule 15: never enable sequences; only PATCH throttle on enabled ones.

 - Telegram summary on every tick.

 Foundation decisions

 1. Scope: prospect-adder only. No rebalancer in S74.

 Phase-a is static for ~8 weeks. An auto-rebalancer has no trigger during that window. Build it when a trigger fires, not before. Profile switches remain manual via the existing

 scripts/create_dre_sequences.py --configure-throttles .

 2. Config = plain Python module, not YAML.

 3 real strategies today. YAML adds a loader + schema for zero clarity payoff. Extract to tools/campaign_config.py ; reporter + autopilot import it.

 3. Direct function call, not subprocess.

 Autopilot exposes run_autopilot() ; agent/main.py imports and calls it. Matches _run_daily_signal_scan shape (main.py:4042). No stdout parsing.

 4. Safety fuse = sum(active throttles).

 Not a magic 100. Fuse can't cap below config. If phase-a says LQD=10 others=0, fuse=10.

 5. Pool refresh: scheduled Monday + self-heal at age >8 days.

 Monday rebuild is routine. If Monday's rebuild fails and Tue/Wed/Thu also fail, Friday's run sees age >8d and rebuilds itself. Never silently runs on stale data.

 6. Per-prospect freshness + cohort-exclusivity checks at add-time (correctness, not just polish).

 Before POST: (a) find_prospect_by_email → if last Activity At < 90d , skip recent_activity ; (b) check the prospect's current sequence States → if already in any sequence tagged dre-2026-spring , skip

 already_in_dre_cohort . Without (b), a lead could be in LQD and TC-MS simultaneously — the cadences would collide and tank reply rate. This is the single highest-leverage correctness check in the whole

 system.

 7. Tag disqualified rows, don't drop silently.

 Pool metadata carries counts per reason ( no_state , no_tz , recent_activity , already_in_dre_cohort , etc.). Telegram summary surfaces them. Silent drops are debugging hell.

 8. adds_last_24h uses simple 24h-back filter.

 Outreach's throttle Max Adds Per Day day boundary isn't documented. 24h-back is strictly conservative, tz-math-free, and self-correcting within a cycle.

 9. Preview-before-live gate.

 --preview CLI mode writes a CSV of the exact next batch (email, company, verified_school, bucket, target sequence name). Steven eyeballs 10 rows BEFORE typing /autopilot_live . Catches systematic classifier

 regressions at the only moment that matters.

 10. Live flag persisted, reset path explicit.

 data/campaign_autopilot_state.json stores {"live_mode": bool} . /autopilot_live sets true; /autopilot_dry sets false; kill-switch file disables regardless. Bot restart preserves live mode (deploys are

 routine; reverting on every deploy is annoying not safe). Safety lives in the kill-switch + /autopilot_dry .

 11. Per-day state file, auto-archive ≥30 days old.

 data/dre_autopilot_2026-04-18.state.json — fresh file per day. Yesterday's stuck plans stay as a read-only record; they don't get retried and they don't bleed into today's run. Cleanup is one line at start

 of each run.

 12. Telegram formatter takes names, not IDs.

 Structural Rule 19 enforcement: no formatter parameter is typed as an int that could be a sequence ID. If a maintainer adds one, type-check catches it before ship.

 13. Sleep cadence 60–120s between POSTs.

 10 adds × 120s = 20 min wall time. Finishes before the 08:00 leadership_scan tick.

 14. Telegram summary only lists strategies that did something.

 Pristine unconfigured strategies ( pool_source=None ) are silent. Noise is the enemy of an always-on notification.

 Architecture

 agent/main.py poll loop

 └─> scheduler.check() → "campaign_autopilot" at 07:00 CST weekday

 └─> _run_campaign_autopilot()

 └─> tools.campaign_autopilot.run_autopilot(dry_run=<persisted flag>)

 ├─> tools.campaign_config.STRATEGIES

 ├─> scripts.campaign_budget_status.build_strategy_report() (reuse)

 ├─> tools.campaign_pool.get_or_build_pool(strategy, refresh=<Mon|age>8d>)

 │ ├─> tools.lead_filters.classify_sf_leads_to_dre_buckets()

 │ │ └─> tools.grade_level_detector.* (pure)

 │ └─> tools.timezone_lookup.state_to_timezone

 ├─> per sequence with throttle>0:

 │ need = throttle - adds_last_24h

 │ candidates = pool[bucket][:need_×2_headroom]

 │ for each: find_prospect_by_email → freshness + cohort checks

 │ build LoadPlan list

 ├─> tools.prospect_loader.execute_load_plan(plans, dry_run, sleep=(60,120))

 └─> format_telegram_summary(report) → send_message()

 Files

 New (prerequisite — Rule 18 debt)

 tools/grade_level_detector.py — pure functions lifted from /tmp/sf_leads_dre_pass3.py + pass4.py :

 - detect_grade(company, verified) -> Literal["Elem","MS","HS","All-Grades","Unknown"]

 - map_grade_span(span) -> Optional[Literal["Elem","MS","HS","AllGrades"]]

 - is_virtual(company, verified) -> bool

 - is_homeschool(company) -> bool

 - homeschool_subsplit(company) -> str

 - is_code_ninjas(company) -> bool

 - normalize_name(name) -> str

 Zero I/O, pure functions, string inputs only.

 tools/lead_filters.py — fuzzy-match + classifier (lifted from /tmp/sf_leads_dre_pass5.py ):

 - TC_SOURCES: frozenset[str] (22 strings from memory/project_uni_lead_source_whitelist.md )

 - Territory Index Named Tuple (the 7 dicts from pass5)

 - build_territory_index_stateaware(svc) -> TerritoryIndex

 - fuzzy_match(company, state, idx) -> tuple[Optional[bucket], tag]

 - classify_row(row, idx) -> Optional[bucket_name] (None = excluded)

 - classify_sf_leads_to_dre_buckets(svc=None) -> Dre Pool Result

 - Dre Pool Result.buckets: dict[bucket, list[Lead Row]]

 - Dre Pool Result.excluded: dict[reason, int]

 Sheets I/O gated behind factory; tests mock it.

 New (autopilot proper)

 tools/campaign_config.py — plain Python STRATEGIES: dict[str, Strategy Config] . Typed Dict with: number , display , tier , weekly_budget , sequence_ids OR sequence_ids_loader , pool_source ( "sf_leads_dre" | None ),

 bucket_to_sequence_name (dict | None), throttle_profile_name .

 tools/campaign_pool.py —

 - PoolLead(dataclass) — strict superset of prospect_loader.Contact : same fields plus bucket: str , source_row_id: str for audit. email_confidence defaults to "VERIFIED" for SF-Leads source.

 - Strategy Pool — {buckets: dict[bucket, list[Pool Lead]], excluded: dict[reason, int], built_at, total_eligible} .

 - get_or_build_pool(strategy_key, *, force_refresh=False) -> StrategyPool :

 - If data/<key>_pool.jsonl exists AND age ≤ 8d AND not force → load.

 - Else build_pool() .

 - build_pool(strategy_key) -> StrategyPool :

 - Dispatches on pool_source . For "sf_leads_dre" : lead_filters.classify_sf_leads_to_dre_buckets() → per-row state → timezone_lookup.state_to_timezone → tag no_state / no_tz → JSONL.

 - NOTE: 90-day dormancy was applied at S72 upstream. At-add-time freshness check in autopilot handles drift since.

 - JSONL schema version in .meta.json sidecar ( schema_version: 1 ).

 tools/campaign_autopilot.py —

 - run_autopilot(strategy_key="all", *, dry_run, preview_only=False) -> AutopilotReport

 - Kill-switch check FIRST: Path("~/.claude/state/scout-campaign-autopilot-disabled").expanduser().exists() → returns disabled report.

 - Per-strategy flow:

 a. Pool load/refresh (Monday OR age>8d OR force).

 b. build_strategy_report(strategy) → per-sequence throttle , enabled .

 c. For each enabled sequence with throttle > 0 :

 - need = throttle - adds_last_24h(seq_id)

 - Pull need × 2 candidates from pool[bucket] (headroom for skips).

 - For each candidate:

 - find_prospect_by_email(email) → if exists, check last Activity At . <90d → skip recent_activity .

 - If prospect exists, check sequenceStates tags → if any tag in {"dre-2026-spring"} → skip already_in_dre_cohort .

 - Else build LoadPlan .

 - Stop at need plans.

 d. If preview_only : write CSV, return.

 e. Else execute_load_plan(plans, state_path=data/dre_autopilot_<today>.state.json, sleep_seconds=(60,120), dry_run=dry_run) .

 - format_telegram_summary(report, *, live: bool) -> str — accepts dicts keyed by sequence NAME (not id).

 - Archive state files >30d → data/archive/ .

 - CLI __main__ : --strategy , --dry-run / --live , --preview , --refresh-pool .

 agent/scheduler.py — __init__ : self._last_campaign_autopilot_date = None . In check() weekday block:

 if hour == 7 and minute == 0 :

 if self._last_campaign_autopilot_date != today:

 self._last_campaign_autopilot_date = today

 return "campaign_autopilot"

 agent/main.py —

 - _run_campaign_autopilot() handler modeled on _run_daily_signal_scan (try/except + Telegram error on failure + send summary on success).

 - Dispatch in the scheduler loop (grep for how "signal_scan" is matched).

 - Startup: load data/campaign_autopilot_state.json → _autopilot_live_flag: bool .

 - Slash commands /autopilot_live + /autopilot_dry (Rule 14 direct-dispatch pattern) — update flag + rewrite state file + reply confirmation.

 - In-memory _autopilot_running: bool ; /autopilot_live refuses with warning if already running.

 agent/CLAUDE.md — add "campaign_autopilot" to Scheduler event enum; document new /autopilot_live + /autopilot_dry commands.

 scripts/campaign_budget_status.py — from tools.campaign_config import STRATEGIES . CLI behavior unchanged. Delete the inline dict.

 .gitignore — data/*_pool.jsonl , data/*_pool.meta.json , data/dre_autopilot_*.state.json , data/campaign_autopilot_state.json , data/archive/ , vault/logs/campaign_autopilot.jsonl .

 Build sequence (6 commits)

 Highest-leverage correctness gates sit at commits 2 (classifier parity) and 5 (cohort-exclusivity + preview). Anything after an unreversed upstream mistake gets redone — hence this ordering.

 Commit 1 — tools/grade_level_detector.py + tests.

 Lift pure functions from /tmp/sf_leads_dre_pass3.py + pass4.py . scripts/test_grade_level_detector.py covers 30+ fixture rows (Elem/MS/HS/All/Virtual/Homeschool/CodeNinjas/Unknown edge cases).

 Verify: .venv/bin/python -m pytest scripts/test_grade_level_detector.py -v .

 Commit 2 — tools/lead_filters.py + tests + live parity check.

 Lift fuzzy-match + classifier from /tmp/sf_leads_dre_pass5.py . Unit tests with mocked Sheets service.

 Verify (live, must pass before merge): run classifier against production SF Leads + Territory Schools. Per-bucket counts must match pass5's measured baselines (pass5.py:44 PASS4 dict) within ±50 rows. Total

 must match 26,137 measured within ±300. Record exact deltas in commit message.

 Commit 3 — tools/campaign_config.py + reporter refactor.

 Extract STRATEGIES to new module; add autopilot keys ( pool_source , bucket_to_sequence_name , throttle_profile_name ) to DRE entry. Reporter imports from it.

 Verify: diff <(git stash; python scripts/campaign_budget_status.py --format json; git stash pop) <(python scripts/campaign_budget_status.py --format json) byte-identical.

 Commit 4 — tools/campaign_pool.py + scripts/build_campaign_pool.py .

 Pool builder writes JSONL + .meta.json . Rule-17 tagging (not dropping).

 Verify:

 - python scripts/build_campaign_pool.py --strategy dre writes data/dre_2026_spring_pool.jsonl .

 - wc -l data/dre_2026_spring_pool.jsonl within ±300 of 26,137 (after no_state + no_tz drops).

 - jq -c '. | {state, tz}' data/dre_2026_spring_pool.jsonl | grep -v '"state":"[A-Z][A-Z]"' | head → empty (every row has 2-char state).

 - .meta.json shows excluded-reason breakdown summing correctly.

 Commit 5 — tools/campaign_autopilot.py (core + preview + all correctness checks).

 Implements kill-switch check, need computation, per-candidate freshness + cohort-exclusivity checks, LoadPlan build, preview CSV, dry-run summary.

 Verify (multi-step):

 1. python -m tools.campaign_autopilot --dry-run --strategy dre → stdout shows Telegram-formatted summary. Grep grep -oE '\b20[1-4][0-9]\b' → empty (no raw IDs).

 2. python -m tools.campaign_autopilot --preview --strategy dre → writes /tmp/campaign_preview_<ts>.csv . Cat it. Manually verify:

 - 10 rows for LQD-Universal.

 - Each row has plausible bucket→sequence mapping.

 - No row has a .com email domain in company field (common classifier bug).

 - No row's email matches an address Steven recognizes as already-active.

 3. python -c "from tools.campaign_autopilot import run_autopilot; r = run_autopilot(dry_run=True); print(r.total_attempted, r.skipped_already_in_cohort, r.skipped_recent_activity)" → confirms the

 correctness checks actually fire on real data (non-zero skipped_* counts are expected and healthy).

 Commit 6 — scheduler wire + slash commands + persistent flag.

 agent/scheduler.py tick. agent/main.py handler + /autopilot_live + /autopilot_dry . Startup loads persisted flag. Error path: any run_autopilot exception → Telegram message with traceback summary.

 Verify (end-to-end ship):

 1. Restart Scout. data/campaign_autopilot_state.json does not exist → flag defaults to False → dry-run mode.

 2. Trigger handler directly: python -c "import asyncio; from agent.main import _run_campaign_autopilot; asyncio.run(_run_campaign_autopilot())" → Telegram gets [DRY RUN] summary.

 3. Inspect vault/logs/campaign_autopilot.jsonl last line: mode=dry_run , strategies.dre.sequences.LQD-Universal.attempted=10, succeeded=0 .

 4. Run --preview CLI locally. Eyeball 10 rows. Spot-check 2 emails in Outreach UI — confirm they're real leads not already active.

 5. Send /autopilot_live in Telegram → confirmation reply → state file updated → cat data/campaign_autopilot_state.json shows {"live_mode": true} .

 6. Re-trigger handler → Telegram gets [LIVE] summary → audit log shows succeeded=10 .

 7. Outreach UI: LQD-Universal has 10 new active prospects. Each prospect record has populated State + Timezone.

 8. Send /autopilot_dry → back to dry-run.

 9. Wait for next 07:00 CST weekday tick → autopilot fires on its own in dry-run mode. Steven sends /autopilot_live when ready for autonomous live runs.

 Telegram format

 🤖 Campaign Autopilot — 2026-04-18 07:00 CST

 [DRY RUN — /autopilot_live to enable real adds]

 DRE (Dormant Re-Engage) · Tier 1

 Sends 7d: 47/266 (17.7%), 219 headroom

 Profile: phase-a (held)

 Would add 10 → LQD-Universal (cohort: 397 left)

 Pool: 26,137 eligible (built Mon 07:02 CST)

 Tier 1 TOTAL: 47/1,063, 1,016 headroom

 Live mode: [LIVE] , Would add → Added . No other strategies printed (pristine unconfigured strategies silent).

 Audit log

 vault/logs/campaign_autopilot.jsonl — one line per run:

 { "ts_utc" : "..." , "ts_cst" : "..." , "mode" : "dry_run|live|disabled|error" ,

 "strategies" : { "dre" : { "budget_7d" : 266 , "sends_7d" : 47 , "headroom" : 219 ,

 "sequences" : { "LQD-Universal" : { "throttle" : 10 , "adds_last_24h" : 0 ,

 "need" : 10 , "attempted" : 10 , "succeeded" : 10 ,

 "skipped_rule17" : 0 , "skipped_recent_activity" : 3 ,

 "skipped_already_in_dre_cohort" : 1 , "skipped_dedup" : 0 , "failed" : 0 }},

 "pool_built_at" : "..." , "pool_excluded" : { "no_state" : 312 , "no_tz" : 4 }}},

 "errors" : []}

 Risks

 ┌───────────────────────────────────────────────────────┬────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐

 │ Risk │ Mitigation │

 ├───────────────────────────────────────────────────────┼────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤

 │ Classifier regression routes leads to wrong cohort │ Commit 2 live parity (±50/bucket, ±300 total). Commit 5 --preview CSV eyeballed before first live run │

 ├───────────────────────────────────────────────────────┼────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤

 │ Lead already in another DRE sequence → cadence │ already_in_dre_cohort check via sequenceStates tag filter before each add │

 │ collision │ │

 ├───────────────────────────────────────────────────────┼────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤

 │ Lead had manual touch since S72 pool built → stepping │ find_prospect_by_email + last Activity At < 90d check before each add │

 │ on Steven │ │

 ├───────────────────────────────────────────────────────┼────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤

 │ Monday pool rebuild fails → Tue-Fri on stale data │ Self-heal: age >8d triggers rebuild on any run; surfaced in summary │

 ├───────────────────────────────────────────────────────┼────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤

 │ Bot crash mid-run orphans today's state file │ Per-day state file ( dre_autopilot_<today>.state.json ). Yesterday's stuck plans don't bleed into today; they're a read-only forensic record. Lost │

 │ │ adds: ≤10/day, recoverable manually │

 ├───────────────────────────────────────────────────────┼────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤

 │ throttle Max Adds Per Day day boundary ≠ our 24h-back │ Conservative: under-sends slightly on days after manual bursts. Revisit if audit log shows attempted > succeeded due to Outreach 429s │

 │ filter │ │

 ├───────────────────────────────────────────────────────┼────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤

 │ Rule 19 slip in Telegram output │ Formatter typed to take names, never IDs. Commit 5 grep check │

 ├───────────────────────────────────────────────────────┼────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤

 │ Railway deploy reverts live flag │ Persisted in data/campaign_autopilot_state.json ; survives restarts │

 ├───────────────────────────────────────────────────────┼────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤

 │ Concurrent command ( /drip_* ) during autopilot run → │ _autopilot_running flag logs warning; outreach_client already handles 429 retries │

 │ Outreach 429 │ │

 ├───────────────────────────────────────────────────────┼────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤

 │ Autopilot wall-time > 08:00 leadership_scan window │ Worst case 10 adds × 120s = 20 min. Hard cap: bail after 45 min │

 ├───────────────────────────────────────────────────────┼────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤

 │ Sheets API down at 07:00 │ Try/except in handler → Telegram error message with traceback summary. Tue retries; if Tue also fails and today's Monday rebuild needed, run │

 │ │ aborts with explicit warning │

 └───────────────────────────────────────────────────────┴────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘

 - prospect_loader.Contact.diocese_or_group field name is domain-specific. Autopilot passes the cohort bucket name ("TC-MS" etc.) through it — ugly but non-breaking. Rename to cohort_tag post-S74 with single

 caller update in diocesan_drip.py .

 - Morning brief doesn't yet include yesterday's autopilot outcome. Add after 2 weeks of live data exists to report against.

 - /apply_profile slash command for Steven to switch phase-a → proportional in one command. Defer until LQD actually drains.

 Non-goals (deferred)

 - tools/campaign_rebalancer.py . Defer until a real transition trigger exists.

 - YAML config. Defer until ~15 strategies.

 - Reply-rate-driven throttle tuning. Needs 2–3 weeks of live data.

 - Wiring pools for strategies #9 / #11. Config entries pool_source=None ; autopilot silently skips.

 - Generalizing classifier beyond DRE. Each strategy gets its own pool_source value + dispatch case in campaign_pool.build_pool when its turn comes.

 Change log from prior draft

 ┌─────┬──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┬───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐

 │ # │ Change │ Why │

 ├─────┼──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┼───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤

 │ 1 │ Added already_in_dre_cohort check at add-time │ Correctness bug. Lead could be in LQD + TC-MS simultaneously; cadences would collide. Single highest-leverage correctness │

 │ │ │ gate │

 ├─────┼──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┼───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤

 │ 2 │ Added last Activity At < 90d freshness recheck at add-time │ S72 pool was 90d-filtered at build. Days-to-weeks between build and run leaves drift; Steven's manual touches need respecting │

 ├─────┼──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┼───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤

 │ 3 │ Added --preview CSV mode + explicit eyeball step before │ Systematic classifier regression would mis-route 10 leads in week 1 otherwise. Totals parity (±50) is necessary but not │

 │ │ /autopilot_live │ sufficient │

 ├─────┼──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┼───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤

 │ 4 │ Persist live flag across restarts (was: reset on restart) │ Railway deploys are routine; reverting every deploy is annoyance, not safety. Safety lives in kill-switch + /autopilot_dry │

 ├─────┼──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┼───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤

 │ 5 │ Per-day state file + ≥30d archive │ Mid-run crashes no longer orphan work into today's path; cleanup is one line │

 ├─────┼──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┼───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤

 │ 6 │ Self-heal pool rebuild on age >8d (was: Monday only) │ Monday failure silently polluted Tue-Fri otherwise │

 ├─────┼──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┼───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤

 │ 7 │ Silent-skip strategies with pool_source=None in Telegram summary │ Noise kills daily-summary signal fast with 24 strategies queued up │

 ├─────┼──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┼───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤

 │ 8 │ Pool-builder lifts from pass3+pass4+pass5 (was: "pass5") │ pass5 imports from pass3+4; accurate scope for commit 1+2 │

 ├─────┼──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┼───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤

 │ 9 │ _autopilot_running flag to warn on concurrent Outreach writes │ Low-probability race; catch with a log line, not a lock │

 ├─────┼──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┼───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤

 │ 10 │ Documented diocese_or_group rename as debt, not a blocker │ Field rename across live callers adds risk without S74 value │
